response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ in a 2014 role; their career is overwhelmingly focused on web, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Extensive background in testing, CI/CD, and agile practices
concerns: Minimal or outdated C++ experience not aligned with core role requirements
No demonstrable exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or embedded systems
Lacks proven experience with message brokers, real-time networking, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.)
